sections.paragraph:
(comp. of בַּל and עָם, non-populus, perhaps i.q. “a foreigner”), [Balaam], pr.n.-

(1) of Balaam the false prophet, -Num. 2224 ; Deu 23:5, Deu 23:6 Jos 13:22 24:9 Mic 6:5. LXX. Βαλαάμ.

(2) [Bileam], of a town of the tribe of Manasseh, situated beyond Jordan, 1Ch 6:55 called elsewhere יִבְלְעָם (יִבְלֶה עָם), [Ibleam], Jos 17:11 Jud. 1:27 2Ki 9:27.
